responses:
theorem P2_implies_P1
    {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X}
    (h : Topology.P2 (X := X) A) : Topology.P1 (X := X) A := by
  dsimp [Topology.P1, Topology.P2] at *
  exact Set.Subset.trans h Set.interior_subset

theorem P2_implies_P3 {X : Type*} [TopologicalSpace X] {A : Set X} :
    Topology.P2 (A := A) → Topology.P3 (A := A) := by
  intro hP2
  dsimp [Topology.P2, Topology.P3] at hP2 ⊢
  intro x hx
  exact (interior_mono (closure_mono interior_subset)) (hP2 hx)
